steps.name: Enable 5 deferred config acceptance tests + fix missing-config notice to include path
criteria: Remove #[ignore] from all 5 tests in tests/acceptance/config_scenarios.rs: valid_config_loads_silently_with_no_config_messages, missing_config_triggers_default_fallback_notice, unicode_emoji_vault_path_resolves_correctly, scan_days_back_zero_exits_code_2_with_actionable_error, scan_days_back_negative_exits_code_2_and_names_the_value
valid_config_loads_silently_with_no_config_messages: exits 0, no config-error messages in stdout/stderr — no code change needed
unicode_emoji_vault_path_resolves_correctly: exits 0, stdout contains 'commit' or 'Commit' — no code change needed
scan_days_back_zero_exits_code_2_with_actionable_error: exits 2, stderr contains 'scan_days_back' and the config file path — no code change needed
scan_days_back_negative_exits_code_2_and_names_the_value: exits 2, stderr contains 'scan_days_back' and the config file path — no code change needed
missing_config_triggers_default_fallback_notice: exits 0, stdout contains 'defaults' AND the config file path — requires main.rs fix: change println! to include config_path in the notice
All 87 existing tests still pass after changes
All 5 previously-ignored tests now active and passing
steps.implementation_notes: In src/main.rs, around line 71-74, the current code is: `if config_absent { println!("No config file found, using defaults"); return Ok(()); }`. Change the println! to include the config path: `println!("No config file found at {}, using defaults", config_path.display());`. Note: config_path is consumed by TomlConfigAdapter::new() before this block, so you must capture a display-able copy before that. Options: (a) capture `let config_path_display = config_path.display().to_string();` before passing config_path to TomlConfigAdapter::new(); or (b) clone config_path before passing it. Then use that string/clone in the println!. In tests/acceptance/config_scenarios.rs: remove the `#[ignore = "pending: ..."]` attribute line from all 5 test functions. Do NOT change test logic.

validation.note: 1-step scope for slice-08. 4 of 5 tests pass after unskipping. Only missing_config_triggers_default_fallback_notice needs a code fix: include config_path in the notice println!.
